title: Poke Card Tracker
description: A shareable tracker for Pokemon card market prices and PSA 10 upside.

cards.name: Eevee & Snorlax GX
cards.set: SM Black Star Promo (Tag Team Tins)

emptyState.title: Samantha's Spectacular Hunt
emptyState.message: A playful little space for future pulls, favorite cards, and the next tiny collecting win.

notes: Avg market is the average of available USD raw-card sources shown on each card: PriceCharting, TCGplayer, and PokeScope when available.

The scheduled updater refreshes TCGplayer through PokemonTCG and adds Cardmarket EUR trend prices through TCGdex where available. EUR Cardmarket values are displayed separately and are not mixed into the USD average.
PokeData and JustTCG are good personal-use/API-key candidates to wire in next; I did not expose or scrape either in the browser.
PSA 10 gem rate is the share of graded copies that earned a 10; lower rates are tougher.
